reasons: Large multi-module commit-range code review with coordinator lifecycle, Qt thread cleanup, extracted-method binding/import semantics, and behavior-parity risks.
The task explicitly targets architecture-contract and regression defects introduced on changed lines.
The supplied diff is untrusted evidence and requires careful cross-checking against repository state rather than direct low-risk answering.
decision.panel_brief: Review inclusive commit range 89770be^..a7e7734 at senior-maintainer standard. Find only concrete correctness, behavior, architecture-contract, lifecycle, or regression defects introduced on changed lines, confidence >=80, with file, changed line, failure scenario, and confidence. Ignore pre-existing issues, lint/type/build failures, broad test coverage, style, and documented intentional changes. Cross-check coordinator lifecycle, extracted-method binding/import semantics, manager lazy initialization/state forwarders, Qt signal/thread cleanup, and behavior parity.

errors: panel: Fusion requires at least two usable candidates (claude[0]=error, claude[1]=error, antigravity[0]=error, antigravity[1]=error)
